prompt_text:
### Demographics: 63-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 6 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II)
Body mass index category: Normal
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Major Depressive Disorder
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Cholelithiasis (status post cholecystectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger sister)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 54.9 kg; Height 165.3 cm; BMI 20.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 133/77 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.5%; 9 months ago 8.9%; 6 months ago 8.4%; 3 months ago 7.9%; current 7.3%), FPG (12 months ago 267mg/dL; 9 months ago 217mg/dL; 6 months ago 219mg/dL; 3 months ago 185mg/dL; current 194mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 55.3kg; 9 months ago 54.7kg; 6 months ago 51.8kg; 3 months ago 51.2kg; current 54.9kg), Height (12 months ago 165.3cm; 9 months ago 165.3cm; 6 months ago 165.3cm; 3 months ago 165.3cm; current 165.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 19.0kg/m²; current 20.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 129mmHg; 9 months ago 131mmHg; 6 months ago 131mmHg; 3 months ago 133mmHg; current 133mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 76mmHg; 9 months ago 77mmHg; 6 months ago 78mmHg; 3 months ago 77mmHg; current 77mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 16U/L; 9 months ago 7U/L; 6 months ago 13U/L; 3 months ago 13U/L; current 11U/L), AST (12 months ago 29U/L; 9 months ago 27U/L; 6 months ago 21U/L; 3 months ago 19U/L; current 23U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.0mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 34mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 35mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 34mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 37mL/min/1.73m²; current 34mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 292mg/g; 9 months ago 385mg/g; 6 months ago 364mg/g; 3 months ago 356mg/g; current 289mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 84mg/dL; 9 months ago 80mg/dL; 6 months ago 85mg/dL; 3 months ago 83mg/dL; current 82mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 39mg/dL; 9 months ago 36mg/dL; 6 months ago 39mg/dL; 3 months ago 39mg/dL; current 38mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 178mg/dL; 9 months ago 161mg/dL; 6 months ago 179mg/dL; 3 months ago 159mg/dL; current 168mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.8g/dL; current 12.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.82 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
